title: Chests O' Plenty
description: Adds Chests to Biomes O' Plenty wood
body:
Looking for a way to keep your Biomes O' Plenty wood organized? Look no further than this mod! With this mod installed, you'll have access to a chest for each wood type in Biomes O' Plenty, making it easier than ever to store and sort your items. For even more functionality, try pairing this mod with [Quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark). While [Quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark) is not required to use this mod, it is the best way to get the most out of it. So why wait? Download this mod today and start organizing your inventory like a pro!
![All chests](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/654/131/screen.png)
